name: StreamNative Extensions — Example
description: Reference sample repository. Two extensions demonstrating the full StreamNative extension API.

extensions.name: Demo (Static)
extensions.description: Static in-memory catalog. Streams Mux's public HLS test asset. No network access — great for a first install to verify everything works.
extensions.author: StreamNative

extensions.name: Open Library
extensions.description: Live search against the Open Library API. Demonstrates the http.get() binding, pagination, and JSON→SearchResult mapping.
extensions.author: StreamNative
